headline: Roper Technologies (ROP) Upgraded to Strong Buy: Here's What You Should Know
summary: Roper Technologies (ROP) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).
